characters.appearance: Male in his 20s with a medium build and brown complexion. He has short black hair, a mustache, and wears rectangular glasses.
characters.wardrobe: He wears a light blue t-shirt and a light blue half-helmet throughout the video.

characters.appearance: Female in her 20s with a slim build and brown complexion. She has dark hair tied back in a low ponytail.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a black button-down shirt and loose black trousers with a white side stripe.
characters.demeanor: Initially stressed and frustrated, later curious and impressed.

characters.appearance: Female AI avatar with a slim build and brown complexion. She has dark hair neatly pulled back and highly symmetrical facial features.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a dark blazer over a light-colored collared shirt.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: चौथा इंटरव्यू था। HR ने बोला English weak है। पहले English सीखो वरना जॉब नहीं मिलेगी। [It was my 4th interview. HR said my English is weak. Learn English first or you won't get a job.]
Character B says: भैया, OTP 4062. [Brother, OTP 4062.]
Character A says: मैडम, बस 1 minute. [Madam, just 1 minute.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: job rejection due to poor English.
- Creates a relatable, frustrating situation for the target audience.
- Sets up the delivery driver as a contrasting figure.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
चौथा इंटरव्यू था (चौथा इंटरव्यू था)
HR ने बोला (HR ने बोला)
English weak है (English weak है)
पहले English सीखो (पहले English सीखो)
वरना जॉब नहीं मिलेगी। (वरना जॉब नहीं मिलेगी।)
भैया (भैया)
OTP 4062 (OTP 4062)
मैडम, बस 1 minute. (मैडम, बस 1 minute.)

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Madam this was actually very easy, it's been only 10 days and now I can see my English has become very fluent these days. Thank you. [Madam this was actually very easy, it's been only 10 days and now I can see my English has become very fluent these days. Thank you.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the hook: the delivery driver speaks fluent English.
- Surprises the customer and the viewer, subverting expectations.
- Demonstrates the end goal of fluency in a real-world context.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Madam this was (Madam this was)
actually very easy, (actually very easy,)
it's been only 10 days (it's been only 10 days)
and now I can see my English (and now I can see my English)
has become very fluent these days. (has become very fluent these days.)
Thank you. (Thank you.)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: आप English किससे सीख रहे हो? [Who are you learning English from?]
Character A says: मैडम, Supernova के AI English tutor से। मेरी तो जॉब जाने वाली थी, पर इस ऐप ने बचा लिया। [Madam, from Supernova's AI English tutor. I was actually about to lose my job but this app saved me.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the solution to the customer's problem.
- Highlights high stakes (saving a job) to build emotional resonance.
- Positions the app as a practical, life-changing tool.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English किससे सीख रहे हो? (English किससे सीख रहे हो?)
मैडम Supernova के (मैडम Supernova के)
AI English tutor से (AI English tutor से)
मेरी तो जॉब (मेरी तो जॉब)
जाने वाली थी (जाने वाली थी)
पर इस ऐप ने (पर इस ऐप ने)
बचा लिया। (बचा लिया।)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: सच में? [Really?]
Character A says: हाँ मैडम। जब भी फ्री होता हूँ, रोज़ 10-15 मिनट practice करता हूँ। [Yes madam. Whenever I am free, I practice for 10 to 15 minutes every day.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Explains the practical application and low time commitment (10-15 mins daily).
- Shows the app interface to build trust and familiarity.
- Emphasizes consistency over cramming.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
सच में? (सच में?)
जब भी फ्री होता हूँ (जब भी फ्री होता हूँ)
रोज़ (रोज़)
10-15 मिनट (10-15 मिनट)
practice करता हूँ। (practice करता हूँ।)
Aisha (Aisha)
Tap to submit (Tap to submit)
Hi Aisha how are you (Hi Aisha how are you)
Hi Aisha how are you I am good (Hi Aisha how are you I am good)

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: बहुत ही simple तरीके से English बोलना सिखाते हैं। [They teach how to speak English in a very simple way.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Emphasizes the ease of learning.
- Reassures users who might find English intimidating or overly academic.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
बहुत ही simple तरीके से (बहुत ही simple तरीके से)
English बोलना सिखाते हैं। (English बोलना सिखाते हैं।)

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: इसमें interview, customer या दोस्तों से बात करने की रोज़ practice कर सकते हैं। [You can practice talking for interviews, with customers, or friends every day.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Replaces competitor's unrealistic hype with Supernova's core value proposition.
- Highlights specific, real-world conversational scenarios relevant to working adults.
- Visually demonstrates the variety of modules available.

interview, customer (interview, customer)
या दोस्तों से (या दोस्तों से)
रोज़ practice (रोज़ practice)
TALK ABOUT ANYTHING (TALK ABOUT ANYTHING)
TALK NOW (TALK NOW)

Talk in Office (Talk in Office)

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: और अगर कोई गलती हो, तो AI tutor तुरंत सही कर देता है। बिना judge किए। [And if there's any mistake, the AI tutor corrects it immediately. Without judging.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Addresses a major pain point for adult learners: fear of judgment.
- Showcases the AI tutor's immediate, safe, and constructive feedback.
- Reinforces the supportive brand tone.

गलती हो तो (गलती हो तो)

बिना judge किए। (बिना judge किए।)
Supernova (Supernova)
KEY TO CONFIDENCE (KEY TO CONFIDENCE)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: अच्छा, पर इसकी fees कितनी है? [Oh, but how much is the fees?]
Character A says: मैडम, बहुत ही affordable है। आप trial लेकर देख सकते हो। [Madam, it's very affordable. You can take a trial and see.]
Character B says: बस इतना ही भैया? Thank you. मेरे फोन में भी ये ऐप download कर दो please. [Just that much brother? Thank you. Please download this app on my phone too.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Handles the pricing objection by emphasizing affordability without making specific claims.
- Shows the customer fully convinced and eager to start.
- Ends the narrative with a strong, organic call to action.

मैडम, बहुत ही affordable है (मैडम, बहुत ही affordable है)
trial लेकर देख सकते हो। (trial लेकर देख सकते हो।)
बस इतना ही भैया? (बस इतना ही भैया?)
thank you (thank you)
मेरे फोन में भी ये ऐप (मेरे फोन में भी ये ऐप)
download कर दो please. (download कर दो please.)

scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides clear next steps with a visual summary of features.
- Removes countdown timers/aggressive hype.
- Drives conversions with a clear trial CTA.
